atorvastatin.reason: Lower CYP3A4 metabolism and reduced interaction risk with macrolide antibiotics.
Less dependent on CYP3A4 metabolism and lower interaction potential.

clarithromycin.reason: Lower CYP3A4 inhibition and reduced risk of statin interactions.
Alternative antibiotic option when macrolide interactions are a concern.

ibuprofen.reason: Lower gastrointestinal bleeding risk and suitable when NSAID use is undesirable.

warfarin.reason: Direct oral anticoagulant with fewer dietary interactions and no routine INR monitoring requirement.
